1  
eCTD v4.0 Controlled Vocabulary (CV) Package v1.0.2 Read Me 
 
1. PACKAGE REVISION HISTORY 
Version Date Comments 
1.0 May 2024 Initial Version. As of eCTD v4.0 Implementation Package v1.6, the 
Controlled Vocabulary files will be maintained in this separate 
package. (00750) Note: the eCTD v4.0 Implementation Package 
v1.5 contains active Code Lists. This version includes the addition 
of new Document Type keywords. (00740) 
1.0.1 August 2024 Technical Correction version.  Document Type Keyword “quality 
of life” (ich_document_type_37) was restored on the Controlled 
Vocabulary spreadshee

4 Technical Correction version.  Document Type Keyword “quality 
of life” (ich_document_type_37) was restored on the Controlled 
Vocabulary spreadsheet 
1.0.2 February 2025 Technical Correction version.  Context of Use Keyword mapping 
for ich_4.2.3.1 was restored on the Controlled Vocabulary 
spreadsheet 
 
This package contains the information for the controlled vocabulary files needed to implement 
eCTD v4.0. 
 
2. INVENTORY OF CONTROLLED VOCABULARY FILES 
 
This package includes a spreadsheet and genericode files with the controlled vocabulary
